Build Better, Faster

Horizon gives your team the tools to ship products at lightning speed without sacrificing quality.

Explore Features

Features

Everything you need to build modern applications, from prototyping to production.

Real-Time Sync

Collaborate with your team in real-time. Changes propagate instantly across all connected clients.

API Builder

Design, test, and deploy APIs with our visual builder. No boilerplate, just business logic.

Smart Analytics

Understand user behavior with built-in analytics. Track events, funnels, and cohorts effortlessly.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Start free and scale as you grow.

Documentation

Comprehensive guides, API references, and tutorials to get you up and running quickly.

Contact

Questions? Reach out to our team at support@horizon.app and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
